name: jiangyue-website-imagegen
description: Codex skill plugin for Jiangyue Technology website image production from confirmed page and image briefs.

interface.shortDescription: Create precise Jiangyue industrial website visuals.
interface.longDescription: A Jiangyue Technology Codex skill for creating, editing, and reviewing website visuals from confirmed image request briefs, with physical plausibility, visual structure, and return-to-planner checks for B2B industrial brand assets.
defaultPrompt: Use $jiangyue-website-imagegen to create a Jiangyue website visual from a confirmed image request brief.
Use $jiangyue-website-imagegen to turn a rough image idea into a production brief after page strategy is clear.
Use $jiangyue-website-imagegen to review a failed Jiangyue website image and decide whether to revise visually or return to planner.
